# Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests were run, or this PR is docs/process only
- [ ] Docs/config were updated if user-facing or workflow behavior changed
- [ ] Debug junk, local outputs, and runtime scratch files were not committed

## Review Gate

- [ ] CodeRabbit has finished reviewing this PR
- [ ] Every CodeRabbit finding was triaged
- [ ] Each finding was either implemented or explicitly marked unneeded with a reason
- [ ] This PR is not being merged before the CodeRabbit triage is complete

- Fallbacks, degradations, or platform-specific behavior:
- Follow-up work, if any:
